dimension.label: Problem Understanding
dimension.evidence: Student persona, constraints, goals and non-goals are visible.

scores.rationale: The demo names the user, decision, constraints and missing evidence.

dimension.label: AI/Analytics Reasoning
dimension.target: Justified approach with clear reasoning, not buzzwords.
dimension.evidence: Transparent scoring, skill gaps, counterfactual slider and baseline comparison.

scores.rationale: The product exposes scoring, deltas and why each recommendation changes.

dimension.label: Solution Design & Architecture
dimension.evidence: Evidence graph, V core, Vue demo, WAIBAv submission gates.

scores.rationale: Component boundaries are clear across V core, Vue demo, evidence and automation.

dimension.label: Impact & Decision Value
dimension.evidence: Four-week plan, portfolio artifact and opportunity shortlist.

scores.rationale: The output changes a student decision and creates concrete proof.

dimension.label: Responsible AI & Ethics
dimension.target: Addresses bias, hallucinations, privacy and failure modes.
dimension.evidence: Guardrails, human approval, synthetic data and no-guarantee language.

scores.rationale: Privacy, bias, over-reliance, hallucination and human approval are explicit.

killer_demo: Move a skill slider and show the recommendation/risk explanation changing live.
Open the evidence graph: input, reasoning, output, human gate and receipt.
Show baseline-vs-coach: the coach improves decision clarity while reducing risky claims.
End on Devpost packet readiness with final submit still gated to the student lead.
